coding_rationale: Active generation of pleasant mental content; rule-governed attentional redirection requiring deliberate sustained effort
Attending to externally provided positive stimuli; prescribed attentional procedure without meaning integration
Deliberate neutral content generation; sequential identification and maintenance of neutral attentional target
Engaging with external neutral task (e.g. Scrabble); following task rules without emotional processing
Direct emotional immersion; stimulus-driven re-experiencing without cognitive mediation or transformation
Stimulus-bound introspective analysis of emotional causes; attention remains on the emotional stimulus despite causal reasoning (consistent with blind coding of all concentration as dot)
Expressive engagement with emotional content without transformation or reframing; reactive immersion
Acceptance/mindfulness: non-judgmental integration of multiple aspects of emotional experience
Cognitive reframing integrating stimulus meaning and alternative interpretations; meaning-level transformation
Multi-perspective integration; relational shift requiring flexible coordination of viewpoints
Open-ended cognitive reframing drawing on multiple integrative processes (k=6; treat with caution)
Deliberate behavioral control of emotional expression; monitoring and rule-following
Raw experiential suppression without behavioral target or rule structure; reflexive rejection of emotional experience
Deliberate thought suppression: rule-governed cognitive control requiring sustained monitoring
Combined behavioral and experiential control; multi-target rule-governed suppression
